text.title: Flaky Test Triage Playbook Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply Flaky Test Triage Playbook end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: collect
step.action: Build initial row set: test_id + last 4 weeks of fail/pass counts + retry counts.

step.name: score
step.action: Compute cost = rerun_minutes_per_week × ops_value_per_min + release_blocks × release_value.

step.name: decide
step.action: For each row choose disposition; quarantine rows get an expiry; deletions get a justification.

step.name: route
step.action: Fix-disposition rows queue to flaky-test-elimination. Quarantine rows get the marker applied + ticket opened for expiry. Deletion rows get a removal PR. Accept-and-budget rows update the flake budget.

step.name: review-followups
step.action: On next cadence, walk last cycle's next-steps to closure.
